---
title: "Figure 6: Trait-mediated responses of bat species to forest fragmentation.   "
subtitle: "Posterior estimates of species-level effect sizes (lnRR) for morphological, ecological, and conservation-related traits under two fragmentation comparisons: fragment vs continuous forest (left panel) and between-fragment comparison (right panel). "
Author: "Dillan Hoyt"
execute: 
  eval: true
  echo: false
  message: false
editor: visual
toc: true
toc-depth: 3
toc-title: Contents
---

```{r}
library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)
library(tibble)
library(ggplot2)
library(posterior)
library(viridis)
library(scales)
library(stringr)
library(brms)
library(rstan)
library(grid)


#Input models
fit_fc <- readRDS("m_batTraits_species.student_CF.rds")
fit_ff <- readRDS("m_batTraits_species.student_FF_new.rds")

# ------------------------------------------------------------------
# 2. Shared fixed effects
# ------------------------------------------------------------------
common_terms <- setdiff(
  intersect(rownames(fixef(fit_fc)), rownames(fixef(fit_ff))),
  c("(Intercept)", "Intercept")
)

# ------------------------------------------------------------------
# 3. Extract fixed-effect summaries + sampled posterior draws
# ------------------------------------------------------------------
extract_effects <- function(mod, response_label, terms, n_draws = 400) {
  fe <- as.data.frame(fixef(mod)) %>%
    rownames_to_column("term") %>%
    filter(term %in% terms) %>%
    mutate(
      signif = ifelse(Q2.5 > 0 | Q97.5 < 0, "yes", "no"),
      sign = case_when(
        Estimate > 0 & signif == "yes" ~ "positive",
        Estimate < 0 & signif == "yes" ~ "negative",
        TRUE ~ "non-significant"
      ),
      response = response_label
    )

  draws <- as_draws_df(mod) %>%
    as.data.frame() %>%
    select(all_of(paste0("b_", terms))) %>%
    setNames(sub("^b_", "", names(.))) %>%
    as_tibble() %>%
    pivot_longer(cols = everything(), names_to = "term", values_to = "value") %>%
    group_by(term) %>%
    group_modify(~ slice_sample(.x, n = min(nrow(.x), n_draws))) %>%
    ungroup() %>%
    mutate(response = response_label)

  list(summary = fe, draws = draws)
}

res_fc <- extract_effects(fit_fc, "Frag–Cont", common_terms)
res_ff <- extract_effects(fit_ff, "Frag–Frag", common_terms)

summaries <- bind_rows(res_fc$summary, res_ff$summary)
draws_all <- bind_rows(res_fc$draws, res_ff$draws)
```

# Labelling and aesthetics

```{r}
pretty_defs <- c(
  Averagemass_g_s = "Average mass (g) 1683 (6529)",

  Conservation_statusNT = "Conservation: Near threatened 36 (478)",
  Conservation_statusDD = "Conservation: Data deficient 68 (379)",

  DietFrugivore   = "Diet: Frugivore 529 (1304)",
  DietInsectivore = "Diet: Insectivore 817 (4698)",
  DietNectarivore = "Diet: Nectarivore 94 (171)",
  DietCarnivore   = "Diet: Carnivore 103 (42)",
  DietOmnivore    = "Diet: Omnivore 82 (77)",
  DietPiscivore   = "Diet: Piscivore 16 (160)",
  DietSanguivore  = "Diet: Sanguivore 42 (77)",

  Habitat_affinity_newClutterMadapted =
    "Habitat affinity: Clutter-adapted 1143 (2439)",
  Habitat_affinity_newBackgroundMclutterMadapted =
    "Habitat affinity: Background clutter-adapted 489 (2570)",
  Habitat_affinity_newEdgeMadapted =
    "Habitat affinity: Edge-adapted 28 (321)",
  Habitat_affinity_newOpenMadapted =
    "Habitat affinity: Open-adapted 7 (1033)",
  Habitat_affinity_newWaterMadapted =
    "Habitat affinity: Water-adapted 16 (166)"
)

fallback_label <- function(x) {
  x %>%
    str_replace_all("_", " ") %>%
    str_replace_all("([a-z])([A-Z])", "\\1 \\2") %>%
    str_squish()
}

label_lookup <- setNames(
  ifelse(
    common_terms %in% names(pretty_defs),
    pretty_defs[common_terms],
    fallback_label(common_terms)
  ),
  common_terms
)

summaries <- summaries %>%
  mutate(term_label = label_lookup[term])

draws_all <- draws_all %>%
  mutate(term_label = label_lookup[term])
```

# Preparing plot data:

```{r}
summaries_plot <- summaries %>%
  mutate(fill_val = sign(Estimate) * abs(Estimate)^0.35)

draws_all_plot <- draws_all %>%
  mutate(fill_val = sign(value) * abs(value)^0.35)

levels_plot <- rev(unique(summaries_plot$term_label))

summaries_plot <- summaries_plot %>%
  mutate(term_label = factor(term_label, levels = levels_plot))

draws_all_plot <- draws_all_plot %>%
  mutate(term_label = factor(term_label, levels = levels_plot))

row_df_plot <- tibble(
  term_label = factor(levels_plot, levels = levels_plot),
  y = seq_along(levels_plot)
)
```

# Palette and title:

```{r}
response_labels <- c(
  "Frag–Cont" = "Continuous forest vs fragment\n(123 species; 1683 observations)",
  "Frag–Frag" = "Fragment vs fragment\n(143 species; 6529 observations)"
)

cb_ramp <- c(
  "#440154FF", "#46337EFF", "#365C8DFF", "#277F8EFF",
  "#1FA187FF", "#4AC16DFF", "#9FDA3AFF", "#FDE725FF"
)

lim <- quantile(abs(draws_all_plot$value), 0.90, na.rm = TRUE)
fill_limits <- c(-lim, lim)
```

# Plotting:

```{r}

p_traits <- ggplot() +
  geom_rect(
    data = row_df_plot[row_df_plot$y %% 2 == 0, ],
    aes(ymin = y - 0.5, ymax = y + 0.5),
    xmin = -Inf, xmax = Inf,
    fill = "grey97", colour = NA, inherit.aes = FALSE
  ) +
  geom_rect(
    data = row_df_plot[row_df_plot$y %% 2 == 1, ],
    aes(ymin = y - 0.5, ymax = y + 0.5),
    xmin = -Inf, xmax = Inf,
    fill = "white", colour = NA, inherit.aes = FALSE
  ) +
  geom_jitter(
    data = draws_all_plot,
    aes(x = value, y = term_label, fill = fill_val),
    shape = 21, height = 0.12, width = 0,
    alpha = 0.10, size = 0.6, colour = "grey55"
  ) +
  geom_errorbarh(
    data = summaries_plot,
    aes(y = term_label, xmin = Q2.5, xmax = Q97.5),
    height = 0.25, linewidth = 0.9, colour = "black"
  ) +
  geom_point(
    data = summaries_plot,
    aes(x = Estimate, y = term_label, fill = fill_val),
    shape = 21, size = 4, colour = "black", stroke = 0.35
  ) +
  scale_fill_gradientn(
    colours = cb_ramp,
    limits = fill_limits,
    oob = scales::squish,
    values = scales::rescale(c(fill_limits[1], 0, fill_limits[2])),
    guide = guide_colorbar(
      title = "Effect size",
      barwidth = unit(8, "cm"),
      barheight = unit(0.4, "cm")
    )
  ) +
  facet_wrap(~response, ncol = 2, scales = "free_x",
             labeller = labeller(response = response_labels)) +
  geom_vline(xintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", colour = "grey50") +
  coord_cartesian(clip = "off") +
  labs(x = "Effect size (lnRR)", y = NULL, fill = NULL) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 12) +
  theme(
    panel.grid.major.x = element_blank(),
    panel.grid.minor.x = element_blank(),
    panel.grid.major.y = element_line(colour = "gray92", linewidth = 0.25),
    panel.grid.minor.y = element_blank(),
    strip.text = element_text(size = 13, face = "bold", lineheight = 0.9),
    strip.background = element_rect(fill = "white", colour = NA),
    strip.placement = "outside",
    axis.title.y = element_blank(),
    plot.margin = margin(t = 20, r = 8, b = 8, l = 8),
    legend.position = "bottom"
  )

p_traits

ggsave(
  filename = "Fig_traits_fragmentation_pub_new.tiff",
  plot = p_traits,
  device = "tiff",
  width = 25,
  height = 22,
  units = "cm",
  dpi = 600,
  compression = "lzw"
)
```
